prompt:
A small batch of hydroponic net cups freshly sanitized: several net cups sitting in a shallow tray beside a clear bowl of diluted peroxide solution, with a soft scrub brush and rinsed water droplets visible. The net cups look clean and free of slime or algae, emphasizing careful prep to reduce biofilm before starting seedlings.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a near-future solarpunk cleanliness aesthetic: soft lighting, clean reflective surfaces, no logos, no readable labels, and no on-image text. Keep the net cups as the focal object, arranged neatly for clear icon readability.
